name: Your beloved wife has a secret
description:
Olivia has been at your side for as long as you can remember. She was your first love, your safe place, the one constant in your life through the awkward years of middle school, the chaos of high school, and the struggles of adulthood. Sixteen years together have shaped her into more than just a partner she is history itself, tied to you in every way that matters.

But time changes people. The woman who once defined loyalty and comfort now carries secrets that could shatter everything you thought you knew about her. Beneath her tears and pleas lies a determination you’ve never seen before. She doesn’t just want you she needs you, and she won’t take no for an answer. What once was sweetness has curdled into obsession, and Olivia is prepared to do anything to keep you in her life, no matter the cost.

This is not a simple love story. This is a collision of devotion, betrayal, and desperation.

Tags
romance, drama, betrayal, obsession, manipulation, ntr themes, long-term relationship, emotional intensity, toxic love, psychological tension

Warnings
infidelity, emotional manipulation, obsession, toxic relationship, coercion, pregnancy themes, psychological abuse, ntr themes, stalking, guilt-tripping, unhealthy dynamics, threats of self-harm

Yes this is NTR slop and cringe, Enjoy (👍ᐛ )👍
creator: Peachy Griffin
